qa_pair.question: For the ACCORD trial (Action to Control Cardiovascular Risk in Diabetes, NCT00000620), what is the minimum eligibility age listed for participants?
For the ACCORD trial (Action to Control Cardiovascular Risk in Diabetes, NCT00000620), what is the maximum eligibility age listed for participants?
Which sex is eligible to participate in the ACCORD trial, NCT00000620? Answer with ALL, FEMALE, or MALE.
Who is the lead sponsor of the Adaptive COVID-19 Treatment Trial (ACTT), NCT04280705?
qa_pair.answer: National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID)

qa_pair.question: In the Adaptive COVID-19 Treatment Trial (ACTT, NCT04280705), which antiviral drug was studied against placebo?
Does the Adaptive COVID-19 Treatment Trial (ACTT, NCT04280705) accept healthy volunteers? Answer Yes or No.
The JAVELIN Lung 100 trial (NCT02576574) studied a first-line treatment for non-small cell lung cancer. Which anti-PD-L1 immunotherapy antibody was being tested?
What is the minimum eligibility age for the Pfizer/BioNTech COVID-19 vaccine study, NCT04368728?

A first-line advanced gastric/gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma trial (NCT02545504) tested the matrix metalloproteinase 9 inhibitor andecaliximab combined with mFOLFOX6. Which company is the lead sponsor of that trial?
Who is the lead sponsor of the Pfizer/BioNTech COVID-19 vaccine study, NCT04368728?
